---
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
listing:
  id: main-listing
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  max-items: 10
  categories: true
  feed: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories, reading-time]
---

::: {#hero}
# Sourangshu Pal

Writing about production AI systems — RAG pipelines, LLMs, vector search, and the engineering that matters in practice.
:::

::: {#main-listing}
:::
